content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.88%, Auto leading +1.46%, Realty +1.96%, IT +0.99%, and VIX cooling -4%. Most sectors green, breadth healthy. Book is +1.15% on the day with multiple positions in profit — focus is now on protecting gains via trailing SLs rather than adding new exposure given 50% deployed and a weak 5-day track record (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24335
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +8% with SL already trailed to 1048 (above breakeven, locks in ~6.5% gain). CMP 1062, target 1110. Current SL is well-placed below today's intraday support around 1054-1057 VWAP. No further tightening needed — give it room to test 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "ETF -2.7%, CMP 121.81 vs SL 119. Defensive hedge thesis intact (Iran, Fed). SL at 119 sits just below recent base around 120.58. Hold; do not exit on a normal pullback in a hedge instrument."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1448.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL/target unchanged. Skip MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Flat position, CMP 403.45 vs SL 401. SL is tight (~0.6%) and just below intraday low 402.30. Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending. Either trade gets stopped on minor weakness or runs to target — risk is bounded. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.6%, SL already at 1750 (above breakeven 1734). High volume 5.3x + Organon deal news supporting. CMP 1761, target 1810. SL placement is tight but appropriate given event-driven move; no further trail warranted yet (would need +2-3% more to justify trailing higher)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 320.50,
      "new_target": 330.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL/target unchanged. Skip MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+2.4%, SL trailed to 480 (above entry 469, locks in ~2.3%). Q4 PAT +75% YoY, dividend Rs 5.25 declared. Stock printed 52w high today at 485.70. SL at 480 sits just below VWAP 479.40 — well-placed. Target 495 achievable on continued momentum. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, SL 615 sits above entry 612 (locked breakeven+). Tomorrow is record date for Rs 11 dividend — capture is on. CMP 615.65. SL is actually right at CMP which is risky; but dividend ex-date will mechanically drop price ~Rs 11. Hold and let dividend capture play; SL will trigger naturally on ex-date if not adjusted, but that's acceptable given ~Rs 11/share dividend offsets. Note: post-ex, may need to widen SL — revisit tomorrow."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results post-market today — binary event risk. Avoid pre-result entries. Re-evaluate tomorrow with clean print."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARTIARTL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today — binary event. Stock already +4% today, extended into print. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "IIFL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Active IT special audit + Rs 56 cr tax demand on subsidiaries + board meeting today. Multiple unresolved overhangs. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ATGL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P/E 90-111x vs peers 11-17x, FY26 PAT growth 0.2%, EBITDA margin contraction. Already reversed from intraday high 680 to 660. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock reversed from intraday high 13548 to 13319 — failed breakout pattern. Net profit -6.9% YoY despite revenue growth. Wait for cleaner setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GNPA 3.43% (worse YoY), recent FY25 derivative accounting issues, management overhaul. Turnaround story but too many lingering risks for high-conviction entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "M&MFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (+106% PAT) but stock already +11% post-results on April 27. Intraday data suggests already extended. Wait for pullback to 305-310 zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already 50% deployed with diversified book (8 holdings across financials, FMCG, energy, pharma, gold, metals). Adding broad index ETF on top would be redundant. 5-day track record (PF 0.4x) argues for patience, not more deployment."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1048, locking in ~6.5% gain. Sufficient for current move; further tightening would risk noise stop-out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, normal pullback, SL placement appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1448.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.7% with SL at 1448 (above entry 1413). Q4 was strong, fresh 52w high. Current SL appropriate; could trail higher only if move extends to +5%+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight 0.6% SL on flat position; bounded risk. Q4 results May 15 are the catalyst. Let it play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1750.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above breakeven at 1750. Volume confirmation + Organon deal narrative supports continued upside to 1810 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 320.50,
      "reasoning": "SL exactly at entry. Position barely deployed; let breakout play out toward 330 target. Board meeting April 30 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 480.00,
      "reasoning": "SL trailed to 480 locking gains. 52w breakout intact, dividend declared. Target 495 achievable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 615.00,
      "reasoning": "Dividend record date tomorrow — Rs 11/share capture. SL near CMP is acceptable for dividend trade; will need to widen post ex-date to account for mechanical price drop."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJFINANCE and BHARTIARTL Q4 results post-market today — re-evaluate tomorrow with clean prints. M&MFIN looks attractive on a pullback to 305-310. ONGC/RELIANCE on energy theme worth tracking but COALINDIA already gives us PSU energy exposure.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned: 50% deployed, +1.15% intraday, multiple SLs already trailed to lock gains. Financial Services cluster check: PNBHOUSING is the only NBFC/financial holding (~8% of book) — within limits. Energy cluster: NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA = ~16% of book, watch for further additions. 5-day track record is poor (PF 0.4x) — discipline says no fresh adds today, focus on letting current winners run with trailed stops. HINDZINC ex-dividend tomorrow needs SL re-management post-ex."
}
